Though her social experiment garnered national controversy, it seems that the mother has no regrets. To this day, Casey maintains that her motive behind going undercover was out of concern for her children's safety. In November of 2023, Casey Garcia stood trial and was found guilty of criminal trespass. She was sentenced to six months of probation and given a probated fine of $700. In addition, she's required to complete 100 hours of community service. Casey's YouTube channel and Tik Tok account are currently still active.
